title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.342 - Earned income tax credit program, AFDC recipients
text:
208.342.  Earned income tax credit program, AFDC recipients. — The director of the department of social services shall, in conjunction with the state treasurer's office, coordinate an earned income tax credit program for qualifying AFDC recipients.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1547 & 961 § 7)
